reviews.review_description: Took photos away. No longer a personal space. Not much special about it now. Used to be a nice place to hang out.
My photos show up fine where I uploaded them awhile ago, but when I go to see my photos in the room after signing in, it says no photos uploaded. Use to work great, now it doesn’t.

Hopefully it’s a technical error - thr game is great for me and my daughter to do things together along with chatting .
I was disappointed that it was glitching and I couldn’t see her avatar - fingers crossed it’s an error that will be fixed shortly
It is very fun I remember the part where I grow old and die!

I purchased the 1st and 2nd step add-on and it fails to launch on the app, and there's no way to find customer support here. Very disappointing. Please troubleshoot within 24 hours or I will request a refund.
I can no longer add photos ice uploaded. They are not even in my list.
None of the games work and neither does the media centre. Disappointed

reviews.review_title: Great app but still needs work
reviews.review_description:
First the good. My mom, 74, got a Quest 3 for Christmas. She lives several states away. Someone recommended this as a fun way to get together. We have chatted, played checkers, and did one of the tour videos. It's been fun.

Now for the desperately needs improvement part. First navigation is clunky at best. It really needs work. And can you please make the accepting an invite process easier? Yikes! I figured it out, but mom can't figure out where to click to accept an invitation. I ended up giving her my room code. Just have accept or decline buttons.

Next, we would love to have more shared games available. Parcheesi, Euchre, cribbage, rummy, snakes and ladders. Stuff my kids can play with Grandma or even each other when the oldest goes to college. For an app that encourages seniors and their distant family to connect, there sure aren't many options to do so.

I visit my little Alcove home from time to time. I noticed today you have done some updates, it looks really nice on Quest 3.

I’m considering making a selection of motivational vids and putting it on the T.V system in alcove. I already uploaded a few vids from my phone and it works well.

I’ve watched all of the health videos that can be watched while on the patio, would be nice to have some more content or even a YouTube player.

I would just love it if Alcove was the loading space when the quest starts and it could have recent apps and so on displayed like the steam VR App.

I hope they will continue to develop alcove, maybe a walk around the garden and sit next to a babbling brook, play with the butterflies etc.

Thanks
I really like this app.  I don’t know why I cant see my friend in the app but she can see me.
Hello can someone help me out. While in Alcove with friends they can’t see me. They hear me and I see them but they can’t see me. Any ideas anyone????

Alcove was created in conjunction with the AARP, and the design of this app reflects this clearly. The user finds themselves in a lush waterfront property, and can move to different parts of the home through selecting pre-determined standing spots on the ground (so no locomotion to speak of). The exterior backdrop environment can be changed to predetermined selections, but this area can only be seen beyond the property's limits and cannot be explored further. A TV room can play a series of AARP videos, but as these must stream from the internet the user must have a very fast internet connection in order to watch these uninterrupted. Available in Alcove are brain-training games, but these hardly use the capabilities of VR and rather seem to be ports of website-based games. A meditation area exists for those interested in exploring such a venture (I was not). Also, a mode exists where the user can spawn a pet rabbit in the home, but the rabbit does not do much (in all fairness, this is probably accurate to having a real rabbit as a pet). Alcove promises much more varied brain-training games, but these require additional purchases. All in all the Alcove experience feels cheap and severely limited, and I doubt additional purchases would improve this experience much.

developer_response.body:
Hi Rodney, thanks for the feedback. Alcove may not be for everyone and I appreciate you giving it a shot.

In the Quick Menu (Accessed by pressing the menu button or B button) you'll find a settings menu. You can find an option for smooth locomotion there.

We are currently investigating ways to improve video streaming performance. 
In the meantime,  the majority of VR videos in Alcove can be downloaded locally for smoother playback. 

We're aiming to revamp a lot of the issues you encountered, such as improved customizability, and introducing more meaningful experiences.

I encourage you to check out the tutorial, as it sounds like you may have missed a majority of the free-no-strings-attached VR videos and other features.

reviews.review_description:
Totally blown away! Most bad reviews here are because the free games don't look like AAA titles and because streaming trips requires 50-100 mbps and people just don't know.. It is an AWESOME project and as many people say there's HUGE potential here that begs to be unwined.. 

I love the frames and the TV, the fact that some friend of mine can visit my virtual home and see my actual photos and then watch some videos or play some games together and i also love the trips! 

The fact that i can play 3rd party apps blew my mind even further and i would LOVE (i beg you actually) to see more apps and games imported that way!

Ways to customize our place even more would be more than welcome (like puting frames somewhere else, moving the TV or changing furniture, decorating or even themes etc) I'd love to see the books represent our bookmarks or ebooks in the future and even more functional objects!

This is a true metaverse home experience and It's a free app, so buy additional content to support the devs for their amazing job!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for kind and thoughtful review Fat.Friendly.Cat! Your support means the world to us! We're always adding new features and content based on player feedback - we're adding your recommendations to our wish list for consideration on a future release. Keep your headset charged we have a ton of new destinations and a few more music concerts lined up. If you have any other suggestions or questions we're always happy to hear from you, email us anytime, feedback@alcovevr.com. Happy Exploring! - Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: not at all user friendly....does not orient or reorient well at all....toggle is sluggisg at best

developer_response.body: Hi dogma7, our team is available to help if you're having technical issues. You can always reach us at feedback@alcovevr.com. We'll investigate to see if we can replicate the issue. Please email us so that we can determine what could be causing your controller issue - we want you to be able to enjoy all that Alcove has to offer! We're always updating Alcove with new content and features - there's over 1,000 destinations across the globe that you can experience with up to 3 Quest friends, casual games like checkers and chess - with more on the way. All our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: Love this app although it took me some time to find everything. Meditation on the relaxing patio or beautiful locations, travel tours (not just google street views) in the travel room, classical chamber music (click on violin in left corner of living room), change framed photos on walls in your living room to your own photos! Brain games & easy workouts great for seniors on the patio, invite friends and family to experience with you.  Use the highlighted areas to move through the house.

I love this app.  It’s so beautiful and easy to use.  The potential is amazing too.  I really felt part of the environment.  Relaxing and wonderful and the exercises look good too .  Want to buy a headset for my mum so we can share the experience.  Imagine house/hospital bound people and how much they would benefit too ❤️..

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind review and feedback. We're always updating with fresh, new content, games and world travel. Keep us posted on your favorites, we're happy to hear from you and answer any questions you might have at feedback@alcovevr.com. Happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed feeling “at home” with the luxuries of exploration at my fingertips. From watching movies together, exploring the world, playing games, or simply sitting in the sunroom, I can see why many people enjoy meeting in Alcove. Looking forward to my next adventure inside Alcove.

developer_response.body: Thrilled to hear you're at home in Alcove SharathMekala! Thanks for your review and feedback, it means the world to us! Many more destinations, casual games, meditations and new features are on the way so you'll always have something new to explore. If you ever need help or have ideas on how we can improve your time in Alcove, don't hesitate to contact us at feedback@alcovevr.com. All our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description:
The keyboard in the app doesn’t have underscore so I can’t enter my email.
Updated: I changed my rating for 5 stars, for developer’s fast response, being polite, generous, and attending my problem.

developer_response.body:
Hi Super_Guard, thank you for catching that! We apologize for the inconvenience, it's getting fixed now and we'll let you know when it's been updated. Meanwhile please continue exploring Alcove, the login is for customizing the gallery only. You can still  travel, play games, and the launch the health and wellness experiences on the back porch. Please contact us at feedback@alcovevr.com if we can help you with anything more. Sincerely, Team Alcove 
*Thanks for the upgrade to five stars Super_Guard! Super_Cool of you!* We appreciate it and are happy to report that we've fixed the keyboard. Please update to v1.153 and continue setting up your media account that lets you customize the gallery with your personal photos and upload 2D and 360 video to the Living Room TV, up to 2GB. Keep us posted on your favorite activities and anything you'd like to see more of in Alcove. All of our best!! Team Alcove

reviews.review_description:
I love being inside this house, especially now that I've worked out how to add my own photos to the walls. I agree with some of the other reviews, that more sound effects would be great for the scenery and the fire. Maybe also have it tied to the time zone so that when I put it on at night it's dark outside?

What I would really love is a game like this where I can actually design and build my own dream house and walk around inside it. Maybe something that has lots of rooms and modules you can select and adapt to build your own place. But really, I would live in the Alcove house if I could.

developer_response.body: Hi Retroramblings, we're glad you love the house and are enjoying your photo gallery! Thanks so much for your kind review and sharing your ideas for a future release. We're always adding new features and content so this helps us zero in on the areas we where we can expand. In the meantime, we hope you enjoy our latest addition of 10 NEW 3D tours of Malta in the Travel Room - over two hours of sightseeing on the Mediterranean island, and new jigsaw puzzles at the Interactives table. You can always reach us at feedback@alcovevr.com. Happy exploring!  - Team Alcove

reviews.review_description:
At first I was a bit weary of downloading this AARP sponsored app - I'm not quite in that demographic yet. Happy to say that I thoroughly loved the experience. My sister and I visited Notre Dame and Vienna from the comfort of our respective homes.

Great way to see the world again - without masks!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear it, thanks so much for your support! Check out our latest update with 10 NEW tours of Malta. Over 2 hours of exploring and sightseeing on the sun-soaked Mediterranean island. Keep us posted on where you and your sister would like to visit next at feedback@alcovevr.com. Bon Voyage!

reviews.review_title: A great app with so much more potential!
reviews.review_description: I love this app.  Great work everyone at Alcove!  Would you consider creating a movie theatre environment for those who are not able to get out to go to a real movie theatre or drive-in?   I know especially the older folks would love a drive-in setting to watch TV or their home movies!  Nostalgia for sure!  Being able to upload our own youtube or home movies would be another great perk!   Keep up the good work!

WOW is the only reaction I can come up with after spending just a half hour within this new application. The ability to connect with my family and friends who live far away from me in a meaningful way while playing games and traveling together?! Now this is finally a solution to the pandemic we're experiencing. I've already uploaded all of my favorite pictures which is a great personal touch to feel surrounded by my loved ones in this new app. Props to the developers and AARP for recognizing social isolation and giving ALL ages a technology and space to enjoy together. I look forward to following this application's updates and spending time with my family inside my new virtual home :)

Great game! So many features and really fun to play with friends. The only concern I have is that when you travel or watch videos it pauses even if im not touching anthing. I couldent even get through 2 min with o it it happing at least 5 time. But other than that really run and i hope to see future improvements.

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear you're enjoying Alcove! 

The issue you're experiencing with videos pausing might be internet connection related. The VR video streaming in Alcove is optimized for WiFi speed of 50-100 Mbps and above, so if your connection is slower than that, videos will indeed be slower. 

We could further compress the videos, but that would visibly impact their quality for all users. Alternatively, we could also have two versions for each video - optimal quality, and compressed, something we did consider, but that may introduce other issues. We will certainly keep looking for ways to best optimize, so everyone can fully enjoy their experience in Alcove! 

Ideally, we'd strongly recommend that you look into higher speed internet for your home, if that is at all an option in your area. We do realize that might not be possible, so we also added the option to download locally most of the videos. Hopefully that can help. 

Please let us know if you see improvements when videos are downloaded locally. You can download as many as you want to watch, and then delete them to make room for more.

Very best, 
Alcove

reviews.review_title: It’s a cool idea but hard to get into
reviews.review_description: This game is very cool but honestly do they expect us to get our whole family to buy an oculus and join in an online house? They need to make it more open for others to join and for more ways to create thing, but overall games are fun cool traveling globe, and good gameplay. Another thing is the tv is very boring and only gives limited content, which I get cause of copyrights or whatever.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. Alcove was created with the goal to foster social connection between family members and friends who have headsets, or may be planning to have one. We'll definitely take your feedback seriously and add it to our list of potential ideas as we continue to build out the app.

reviews.review_title: Needs option to connect to Kindle,Nook..
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy Alcove. I love having the ability to relax and meditate by the ocean or in the backyard.￼ However, I really wish there were an option to connect to Kindle or Nook and have the ability to read books on the interactive screens while enjoying the scenery. Or possibly connecting to Audible through the headset.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your support and kind words Anica22!  We're always updating Alcove with fresh new content and these are fantastic ideas to add to our wish list for a future release. 

In the meantime we hope you enjoy the latest release featuring MultiBrush by Rendever, a social 3D painting experience based on TiltBrush where you can create and share art with friends. Click on the blue paint can in the corner of the Living Room TV to launch single player, then in MultiBrush, open a room to invite your Oculus friends. Check out the unique set of brushes, environments and effects that only VR can deliver!

If you have any questions or more suggestions, please contact us at any time at, feedback@alcovevr.com. Happy exploring and all of our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: My very first review! I wrote this review for this app because it’s my very first app I actually visit every day. I absolutely LOVE the travel room. Great app to download.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five stars! We're grateful for your enthusiasm and glad to hear you're enjoying the Travel Room - plenty of new destinations are on the way. We're always adding something fun and new, like our latest 360, 3D tours of the Azores. Please keep us posted on your favorite activities and how we can improve Alcove. You can reach us directly at feedback@alcovevr.com. Happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: I purchased the addition to be able to take a bus ride in Dubai, dive the Barrier reef, etc. BUT in EVERY video, and I tried many, the movie would stop for aa few seconds, then continue while the movie caught up with its loading.  About every 7 - 12 seconds of video it would stop!  WHY????What can I do to let it continue on, not pausing for several seconds? Please tell me how to make the movie continue on!

developer_response.body: Hi, we understand your frustration and are here to help. Stuttering video is often due to network speed. VR video streaming in Alcove is optimized for WiFi speed of 50-100 Mbps and above, we recommend testing your WiFi to see if it's within range. If it is, please email us at feedback@alcovevr.com so we can help determine the issue. Alternatively, you can download most of the videos in the Travel Room, with a few exceptions. The download icon is to the right of the play button. The bus tours and reef dives are free - the Alcove Add-ons are for the Staying Sharp Brain Games and the Into Space VR films. Into Space isn't available for download, please contact us if you have questions about your Add-on purchase. Meanwhile, there's a lot more to explore in Alcove, and we invite you to try the games at the Interactives Table which include, checkers, puzzles and a virtual pet rabbit which is fun to dress up in silly hats and feed virtual carrots. Please let us know if you need more assistance. Thanks and all our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_title: Great app that could be amazing!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this app and can't beat that it's free. I do agree with others though that there could be more scenes. The ocean and mountain scenes are really nice. The meadow is pretty boring. It would be nice if we could hear the ocean more or hear wind blowing through the mountains. Adding the noise of the fire crackling and popping would also be nice. Being able to listen to soft music outside while enjoying the view would be good. The ability to add rain or a thunder storm to the meadow would make it more relaxing/interesting to me.  More content to the tv or the ability to sync with Netflix or prime would be great! Adding different living environments would also be nice but I know I'm getting carried away.  Also it is the end of January and time to take down the Christmas tree I think. Overall and great app with some really nice features.

developer_response.body: Hi FirePhoenix28 thanks for taking the time to provide us with this valuable feedback! We appreciate the time you spend in Alcove and these suggestions really help us zero in on how we can improve the experience. Yes, while the spirit of the holiday remains, the decorations must go into virtual storage for next year, thanks for the reminder - it's definitely on our to do list :)

reviews.review_description: Trying to sign in for accounts in order to upload pictures is ridiculously difficult. The screen is glitchy and is trying to get my password but has an overlay on it that is asking for my email. So I can see both text bubbles at the same time. So I sign up for an account and then you're supposed to get a confirmation email which I never received. So I go in again and it says click here if you didn't receive the confirmation email. So I did and I wrote that I didn't receive the confirmation email. So now I'm talking to somebody who runs their Facebook account and they are being very snarky In trying to get information for me and not asking very direct questions so when I mentioned the glitch, they said "This is critical information that was not included in your first message and that I need to be able to explain to the developers what the nature of the issue is." Basically asking why I didn't tell them about the glitchy screen in the first place. "Because the screen just said to click here and let you know that I didn't receive the confirmation email, so that's what I did, figuring you would ask me other questions, if necessary". What the heck! Whoever runs that site needs to work on their customer service etiquette 😆 Maybe I will get through this and to be able to use the app, but I have a feeling that I'm going to end up just deleting it.

developer_response.body:
**Hi Cllevy! Please see our newest release, v1.152 which fixes the bugs you encountered. We invite you to you explore our newest features including Smooth Locomotion and Avatars in video. If you have any other questions please don't hesitate to reach us at feedback@alcovevr.com. Thank you.**
 
Dear Cllevy, We're aware of a login issue impacting some users and are currently testing a solution. We apologize for the inconvenience and hope to have the issue resolved as soon as possible. We're sorry you had this experience with our support team member. Thank you for bringing this to our attention. Our users mean the world to us and we strive to offer them our best. We fell short. We'll definitely review what happened and make improvements. We hope to have you exploring all that Alcove has to offer very soon. Sincerely, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: I love the idea and the environment… just need friends :).  However today I tried to reset an account and the keyboard kept appearing over top of the “password” field.  And there was no way to escape.  I ended up having to turn off my oculus since even the menu buttons were not working.  Please fix this!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your review!  We're working on a patch to fix this and should have it resolved shortly. Appreciate your support! All of our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: I really like the Alcove, however when I go into this app  the camera on the tours keeps sticking-  after a few seconds.   I also find this with the screen in the main room.  Can anyone advise me what to do  ?   Many thanks in advance.t

developer_response.body:
Hi, glad to hear you like Alcove, we're here to help! If the video playback is glitchy, this is most likely due to a slow wi-fi connection. Alcove VR video playback is optimized for  WiFi speed of 50-100 Mbps and above. At your earliest convenience you can test speed at the following site: https://www.speedtest.net/

Alternatively, most of the Alcove videos are available for download, select the download icon next to the play button. Watch them as often as you like and then delete them to save headset storage space. 

Please note that some videos including the Into Space VR film aren't available for download due to licensing agreements with the creators to protect their work from unauthorized use. 

Our dedicated team is always working to improve optimization and we look forward to offering more options as we expand future releases of Alcove. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to reach us directly at feedback@alcovevr.com. We appreciate your feedback and support. 

All our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: Videos stop every 3 seconds extremely annoying! And I have a reliable & fast internet connection. Video quality is not up to VR standards in my opinion. Was not impressed

developer_response.body:
Hi Dylansb3, our team is dedicated to providing families  with a safe and easy way to explore VR together. We understand how frustrating it can be when the videos won't play as expected and hope you'll give us another chance. 

Video streaming in Alcove is optimized for WiFi speed of 50-100 Mbps and above. The alternative is to download the videos locally and then delete them when you're finished to avoid taking up too much space on your headset. Most videos can be downloaded and will have a download icon opposite the play button. While that's not always ideal - and not all videos can be downloaded due to licensing agreements that protect the creators from unauthorized use, we hope that it helps. 

Meanwhile, we're always working to improve our video optimization and expect that performance will improve as we continue to grow.  Please let us know if you have any other questions, you can always reach us at feedback@alcovevr.com. All our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: Wow this is an amazing app. Lovely just to relax and watch the sea.

Bad experience so far. Can't download any videos and I can't find any customer support. I point and click on the download icon and it x's out. Can't play videos for more than a few seconds at a time. Not user friendly. The tutorial tells you hardly anything.

developer_response.body: Hi Keith242424, Your feedback means the world to us and we're sorry that your experience wasn't five stars. Our email address is located at the bottom of the Alcove Welcome panel, we're always available to help at feedback@alcovevr.com. After you press the download icon, the red X indicates that it's is downloading. Then a gray band will appear to show the progress - we realize it's confusing and are working on a new design. VR video streaming in Alcove is optimized for speeds between 50-100mbps, we recommend testing the speed to see if it's within range. We want you to be able to enjoy the over 1,000 breathtaking destinations across the globe as well as Alcove's casual games and media sharing features.  We hope that you'll give us another chance and contact us at feedback@alcovevr.com if you need further assistance. All our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description:
Update: Thanks for the response to my review! That alone bumps the stars up to 4! 

I did visit the travel room and will admit, it was great...for about 3 minutes per location. I'll give it another shot but Wander is so much better. 

I will say that I also understand what you're saying about nausea and walking. It's not an issue for me but it may very well be for others. 

The glitches were in the free mini games. I wish I could have grabbed a screen shot.  The count the blocks game showed 11 blocks but 11 was not one of the choices. I even got a second opinion:)

Fyi: male, 61 years old, gamer for the past 30 years. Maybe not the demo? Keep up the well appreciated customer service! 

Original review:

If there is a group of people that can't deal well with glitches, it's seniors. Not really anything to do in the free version except chess and checkers. Not sure I'll spend any money for the upgrade packs. 

Why can't we simply walk around in the house? This is vr. Needing to click to move and re-enter your view seems wrong. 

I'm hoping for a version update for the higher screen resolution of the quest 2. 

Price of free almost makes it worth while.

developer_response.body:
Update: Thanks so much ropdaddy! We really appreciate it. We're looking into the game and will see if we can replicate the issue. We have a great partnership with Wander, did you know you can launch the app within Alcove's travel room? Select the standing globe (not the one in the center of the room) to open Wander. Happy exploring! -  Hi ropdaddy, glitches are never fun at any age! We'd like to know more about the ones you experienced in Alcove, if it's a video playback issue or something else. Did you miss the travel room and other areas of the house? They have hundreds of free 4k 360 video tours, hot air balloon rides, cross-country road trips, diving expeditions and more -optimized for wifi speed of 50-100 Mbps and above - for smoother playback most can be downloaded to your headset and deleted after viewing.

You can move through Alcove by pressing the B key on your right controller which brings up the category menu so if you don't like teleporting, you're able to access different rooms in the house immediately. 

We prioritized teleportation based on early user feedback which determined that it caused the least amount of nausea and discomfort for users, it also helped keep our development costs low so that we can continue offering Alcove free. 

We're constantly updating with fresh new content and we always want to hear from users on how we can make it a better experience - what would you like to see and do more of in Alcove? Please email us at anytime at feedback@alcovevr.com so we can help determine the issue and fix the glitches you experienced. Many thanks!

reviews.review_description: Having problems getting set up.. won't let me login and seems to freeze .. I don't know how to fix It

developer_response.body: Hi Nenebug20, we're glad to report that the issue's been fixed with our latest update! Your media account appears to be active, we hope you're enjoying your family gallery. We've updated our previous response with the latest info. If you have any questions or recommendations please don't hesitate to reach us at feedback@alcovevr.com. We're always updating Alcove with fresh new experiences, games and features and like to incorporate as much user requests as possible. Happy exploring and all of our best, Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: I like it for the travel experiences and being able to simulate looking out into the ocean from my own porch.   I would like more scenes that I can view from my house and more and longer travel experiences.   I agree with another reviewer that linking a service like Netflix would be a nice touch.

developer_response.body:
Wonderful feedback! Thanks so much for your support. We value the time you spend in Alcove and have added your suggestions to our list for a future release. 

We're constantly updating Alcove with new features and content and hear you on longer travel experiences. Our latest release has 10 NEW 3D tours of Malta - over 2 hours of sightseeing the Mediterranean island's ancient cities, sun-soaked beaches, parks, cafes and more. New games including 360 and 2D jigsaw puzzles are at the Interactives table.

We're always available at feedback@alcovevr.com if you have any other recommendations or questions. Happy exploring! - Team Alcove

reviews.review_description: This is a beautiful chill out spot perfect for meditation, talking to friends, and watching TV (though clunky as you have to add your own videos). It’s sorely missing customization though. I wish there were options for house design, and swapping furniture as well as changeable locations (like going to a lounge, theater, park).

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you're enjoying Alcove! We're always adding new features and content so your recommendations really help us focus on what matters most to users as we expand. Thanks for the your valuable feedback and support. - Team Alcove

reviews.review_title: So impressed! What a wonderful, fun app!
reviews.review_description: Today, despite coronavirus, despite my mom's limited mobility, despite being on opposite sides of the U.S., my mom and I stood together on the parade ground of the Tower of London (on one of the many tours available via the Alcove travel room), and it was an incredible moment. We got this app to broaden our horizons during the pandemic, but I ended up finding so much more. A peaceful patio where I can do breathing exercises and guided meditations. Games that my mom and I can play together. Memory games we can play to help keep our minds sharp. And, as if that's not plenty to be happy about, I can say that the Alcove Team are wonderful people who genuinely care about their customers. I've never felt so much like a developer cared about my experience. They genuinely want to make this something everyone can enjoy. I can't recommend it enough!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so very much for your kind words ELOJS! We love hearing about how you and your mom are using Alcove to connect and virtually travel the world. Keep us posted on your adventures, all our best!

reviews.review_description: This is like my vacation home. I have it set to beach, have my family photos on the wall, and I meet up with my friends there and visit. It's my favorite app in occulus.  Thanks, Alcove,  for giving me a place to relax.

developer_response.body: We're thrilled to hear Alcove is your favorite app, thanks so much for your support and five-star review! Your feedback means the world to our team and helps us improve the experience as we continue to add new activities and global destinations. Now you can relax with friends in Malta! Our latest destination in the Travel Room features 10 NEW 3D tours of the Mediterranean island - over 2 hours of sightseeing. Keep us posted on what you'd like to see more of on a future release. Email us at any time at feedback@alcovevr.com. All our best! Team Alcove
